spec_natural_language: function verifyECDSA MUST reject signatures array when the same validator address appears more than once (either through duplicate signatures or signature malleability)

violated_invariant.precondition: signatures array contains multiple signatures from the same validator address
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: Each counted validator signature must be from a distinct signer address; duplicate signers should not increment the validator count

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly identifies that verifyECDSA does not check for duplicate validators in the signatures array, allowing a single compromised validator to submit the same signature multiple times to bypass the required_validators threshold. The affected lines are explicitly referenced in the report.
